prompt: Which of these is NOT one of the five mandatory BoQ categories?
A BoQ that lists only PV modules, batteries, and inverters is missing…
options: Nothing — that is the complete list
Distribution, civil works, and general items

prompt: Why include spares in the BoQ rather than buying them on-demand?
options: Without on-site spares, a single fault becomes weeks of downtime

prompt: Surge protection devices in Nigerian outdoor installations are…
options: Required, and cheap up-front, expensive to retrofit after damage
Only needed in the rainy season

prompt: As-built drawings belong in the BoQ because…
options: They are billable to the customer
They are required for NEMSA inspection and future O&M
They count as a civil works item
